description_short: All-in-one unit converter with 50+ unit types, favorites, and history
description_full: Convert anything instantly. Length, weight, temperature, speed, volume, area, data storage, time zones, pressure, energy, fuel economy, cooking measurements, and more. Over 50 unit categories with 500+ individual conversions. Save your most-used conversions as favorites. Full history of every calculation. Works completely offline — no internet needed, ever.
features: 50+ unit categories covering all common and scientific units
Categories: Length, Weight, Temperature, Speed, Volume, Area, Data Storage, Time, Pressure, Energy, Power, Fuel Economy, Cooking, Angle, Force, Frequency
Favorites: star any conversion pair for quick access
Search: find any unit by name or abbreviation
Swap button: instantly reverse conversion direction
Copy result to clipboard with one tap
Scientific notation for very large/small values

screens.name: CategoryList
screens.description: Grid or list of unit categories (Length, Weight, etc.) with icons. Search bar at top. Favorites section pinned above categories.
components: Each category shows top 2 most-used units as subtitle

screens.name: ConversionView
screens.description: Two-field converter. Top field = input, bottom field = output. Unit pickers on each side. Swap button between them. Keypad or system keyboard.

screens.name: HistoryView
screens.description: Chronological list of past conversions. Tap to re-open. Swipe to delete.
components: Each row: value, from unit, to unit, result, timestamp

unit_data.note: All conversion factors are hardcoded constants bundled in a JSON file within the app. No API calls.
unit_data.source: NIST reference values for scientific units, common cooking references for kitchen units

aso.title: Unit Converter Pro
aso.subtitle: 500+ Conversions Offline
aso.keywords: unit converter,metric converter,measurement,convert units,length,weight,temperature,imperial,celsius,fahrenheit,kg to lbs,km to miles,cooking converter
aso.promotional_text: Convert anything. 50+ categories, 500+ units, zero internet needed. One-time purchase, no ads forever.

ja.subtitle: 500以上の変換をオフラインで
